title: Routing, Selection, Translation, and Redundancy · Operations Brief: Net Dynamic Routing
summary: Connect branch, headquarters, cloud, and internet routes while diagnosing asymmetry and failover. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net dynamic routing increment in a routed hybrid branch design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare BGP, EIGRP, and OSPF scope, neighbor behavior, path information, convergence, and use cases at N10-009 depth.
Configure and evaluate static and default routes with next-hop reachability, recursion, failover, and documentation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
